data.name: admin.aira.emailBody.defaultRefinementText
data.value: Generar borrador del cuerpo del correo

data.name: admin.aira.emailBody.editTooltipText
data.value: Editar parámetros de generación de contenido

data.name: admin.aira.emailBody.quickTipBody
data.value: Especifica la longitud máxima del texto generado. Describe al público objetivo, cuál es el mensaje principal y qué debe hacer el lector después de leer el contenido (llamado a la acción).

data.name: admin.aira.emailsubject.wrongAiConfiguration
data.value: No se encontraron los campos seleccionados como origen de contenido para la función AIRA. Contacta a tus administradores para revisar la configuración de campos.

data.name: admin.aira.general.disabledButtonOnOpenedAIRATooltip
data.value: El panel de AIRA ya está abierto

data.name: admin.aira.general.toneWarningText
data.value: El tono de voz aún no se ha definido. AIRA utiliza actualmente un tono neutral. Puedes agregar directrices de tono de voz en la aplicación AIRA, en la categoría Generación de contenido.

data.name: admin.aira.sidePanel.closePromptHeadline
data.value: Salir de la ventana de AIRA

data.name: admin.aira.sidePanel.closePromptMessage
data.value: ¿Seguro que deseas continuar? Al salir se descartará toda la configuración y el contenido generados.

data.name: admin.aira.status.outdated
data.value: Tu versión de Xperience ya no es compatible con el servicio AIRA actual. Actualiza a la versión más reciente de Xperience para restaurar la funcionalidad de AIRA.

data.name: admin.aira.status.unavailable
data.value: AIRA no está disponible para tu proyecto. Si te interesa, contacta a tu representante de ventas para obtener una licencia con acceso a AIRA.

data.name: admin.aira.status.unknown
data.value: AIRA no está disponible en este momento.

data.name: admin.aira.emailsubject.promptPlaceholder
data.value: How do you want to adjust the generated text?

data.name: admin.aira.emailsubject.wrongAiConfiguration
data.value: None of the fields selected as the content source for the AIRA feature can be found. Contact your administrators to check the field configuration.

data.name: admin.aira.general.disabledButtonOnOpenedAIRATooltip
data.value: The AIRA panel is already open

data.name: admin.aira.general.toneWarningText
data.value: The tone of voice has not been defined yet. AIRA currently uses a neutral tone. You can add tone of voice guidelines in the AIRA application, under the Content generation category.

data.name: admin.aira.sidePanel.closePromptMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to continue? Navigating away will discard all current configuration and generated content.

data.name: admin.aira.status.outdated
data.value: Your Xperience version is no longer compatible with the current AIRA service. Please update to the latest Xperience version to restore AIRA functionality.

data.name: admin.aira.status.unavailable
data.value: AIRA is not available for your project. If you are interested, contact your sales representative to obtain a license with access to AIRA.

data.name: admin.aira.status.unknown
data.value: AIRA is not available at the moment.

data.name: admin.base.assetMove.headline
data.value: Selecciona una carpeta de destino para el archivo "{{assetName}}"

data.name: admin.base.assetPanel.noExistingLibrary
data.value: No se puede insertar un archivo desde una biblioteca multimedia. No hay bibliotecas disponibles de las cuales seleccionar los archivos.

data.name: admin.base.assetSelector.assetPanel.disabledImage
data.value: Este elemento no se puede seleccionar porque no tiene una variante de respaldo adecuada; por lo tanto, no se mostraría ninguna imagen en el editor de texto enriquecido.

data.name: admin.base.assetUploadTile.inactiveMessage
data.value: La carga no está disponible en este momento. Ya hay otra carga en curso.

data.name: admin.base.cascadePublishDialog.headline
data.value: Selecciona los elementos de contenido vinculados que se deben publicar con los elementos seleccionados (principal)

data.name: admin.base.cascadeTranslateDialog.headline
data.value: Selecciona qué se debe traducir junto con los elementos seleccionados

data.name: admin.base.cascadeTranslateDialog.translate
data.value: Traducir elementos junto con los elementos seleccionados

data.name: admin.base.command.forbiddenAccess
data.value:
Acceso denegado
No tienes permiso para realizar esta acción. Si crees que se trata de un error, contacta a tu administrador.

data.name: admin.base.conditionBuilder.cancelConfirmation
data.value: Los cambios que realizaste no se han guardado. ¿Quieres descartar los cambios sin guardar?

data.name: admin.base.conditionBuilder.overview.headlineForMultipleConditionGroupsAfterOperator
data.value: de los siguientes grupos de condiciones se cumplen:

data.name: admin.base.conditionBuilder.overview.headlineForOneConditionGroup
data.value: Se aplica si se cumplen las siguientes condiciones:

data.name: admin.base.conditionBuilder.overview.loaderError
data.value: Ocurrió un error inesperado y no se pudieron cargar tus condiciones.

data.name: admin.base.conditionBuilder.textAfterOperatorSelector
data.value: de los siguientes grupos de condiciones se cumplen.

data.name: admin.base.conditionBuilder.textAfterOperatorSelectorInConditionGroup
data.value: de las siguientes condiciones se cumplen.

data.name: admin.base.contentItemPanel.noContentItems
data.value: No hay elementos de contenido disponibles de los tipos seleccionados.

data.name: admin.base.contentItems.createLanguageVariant.infoMessage
data.value: Tu solicitud se está procesando. Espera, por favor.

data.name: admin.base.contentItems.deleteContentItem.dialog.messageInUse
data.value: Esto también elimina todas las referencias a los elementos desde otros contenidos en el sistema: páginas, correos electrónicos, otros elementos de contenido, etc.

data.name: admin.base.contentItems.editContentItem.noFieldsTitle
data.value: Este elemento de contenido no tiene campos editables.

data.name: admin.base.contentItemSelector.closePrompts.closeAll.message
data.value: ¿Seguro que quieres cerrar TODOS los cuadros de diálogo y descartar los cambios sin guardar?

data.name: admin.base.contentItemSelector.closePrompts.closeOne.message
data.value: ¿Seguro que quieres cerrar el cuadro de diálogo actual y descartar los cambios sin guardar?

data.name: admin.base.contentItemSelector.contentItemPanel.disabledImage
data.value: Este elemento no se puede seleccionar porque no tiene una variante de respaldo adecuada; por lo tanto, no se mostraría ninguna imagen en el editor de texto enriquecido.

data.name: admin.base.contentItemSelector.contentItemPanel.noContentItems
data.value: No hay elementos de contenido disponibles de los tipos seleccionados.

data.name: admin.base.contentItemSelector.possibleFallbackMessage
data.value: Algunos elementos seleccionados no están traducidos o no tienen una versión publicada. Se usará una variante de idioma de respaldo si está disponible.

data.name: admin.base.contentSynchronization.panel.contentItemSelectorHeadline
data.value: Selecciona los elementos de contenido a sincronizar

data.name: admin.base.contentSynchronization.panel.genericError.message
data.value: Ocurrió un error durante la sincronización. Intenta nuevamente más tarde.

data.name: admin.base.contentSynchronization.panel.genericError.name
data.value: Ocurrió un error durante la sincronización

data.name: admin.base.contentSynchronization.panel.linkedInfo.contentItems
data.value: Los elementos de contenido reutilizables vinculados, las páginas, las etiquetas asignadas y sus taxonomías, y las carpetas de contenido se sincronizarán junto con los elementos seleccionados. Para los elementos en estado Borrador (Nueva versión) o en un paso de flujo de trabajo personalizado, se sincronizará la última versión publicada.

data.name: admin.base.contentSynchronization.panel.linkedInfo.forms
data.value: El formulario seleccionado se sincronizará sin sus datos de envíos, configuración de respuesta automática ni procesos de automatización o notificaciones de envío relacionados.

data.name: admin.base.contentSynchronization.panel.linkedInfo.webPages
data.value: Los elementos de contenido reutilizables vinculados, las páginas, las etiquetas asignadas y sus taxonomías, y las carpetas superiores se sincronizarán junto con las páginas seleccionadas. Para los elementos en estado Borrador (Nueva versión) o en un paso de flujo de trabajo personalizado, se sincronizará la última versión publicada.

data.name: admin.base.contentSynchronization.panel.restorationSchedule.ariaLabel
data.value: Hora de la programación de sincronización

data.name: admin.base.contentSynchronization.panel.restorationSchedule.message
data.value: Ocurrió un error durante la sincronización. Intenta nuevamente más tarde.

data.name: admin.base.contentSynchronization.panel.restorationSchedule.scheduleTimeSelectorExplain
data.value: Se muestra en tu hora local (GMT {{offset}})

data.name: admin.base.contentSynchronization.panel.successful.finishCompletedSubTitle
data.value: El contenido de la sincronización se restaurará en el destino el {{date}}

data.name: admin.base.contentSynchronization.panel.successful.tipText
data.value: Si necesitas cancelar o reprogramar la restauración, ve a la aplicación Sincronización de contenido en la instancia de destino y elimina la tarea de sincronización.

data.name: admin.base.contentTypes.binding.noChannelsText
data.value: No hay canales disponibles. Puedes crear uno nuevo en la aplicación Administración de canales.

data.name: admin.base.contentVersions.versionDetail.action.cancelScheduledPublish
data.value: La publicación programada para la siguiente fecha se ha cancelado: {0}.

data.name: admin.base.contentVersions.versionDetail.action.cancelScheduledUnpublish
data.value: La despublicación programada para la siguiente fecha se ha cancelado: {0}.

data.name: admin.base.contentVersions.versionDetail.action.scheduledPublish
data.value: Este elemento se programó para publicarse en la siguiente fecha: {0}.

data.name: admin.base.contentVersions.versionDetail.action.scheduledUnpublish
data.value: Este elemento se programó para dejar de publicarse en la siguiente fecha: {0}.

data.name: admin.base.contentVersions.versionDetail.noFieldsTitle
data.value: Este elemento no tiene campos editables.

data.name: admin.base.contentVersions.versionDetail.setBy
data.value: The task has been set by {0} on {1}.

data.name: admin.base.edit.noElementText
data.value: This can be caused by a form misconfiguration or an unexpected error.

data.name: admin.base.edit.noElementTitle
data.value: There is no form element to display.

data.name: admin.base.fetch.networkError
data.value: We have encountered an unexpected error. Original error status:

data.name: admin.base.fetch.unexpectedError
data.value: We have encountered an unexpected error. Error status code:

data.name: admin.base.fieldEditor.cancelConfirmation
data.value: Changes you made are not saved. Do you want to discard the unsaved changes?

data.name: admin.base.fieldEditor.deleteConfirmation
data.value: Are you sure to remove the field?

data.name: admin.base.fieldEditor.fieldInvisible
data.value: This field is not visible in the editing form

data.name: admin.base.fieldEditor.fieldsCollectionEmpty
data.value: The collection of fields is empty.

data.name: admin.base.fieldEditor.fieldVisible
data.value: This field is visible in the editing form

data.name: admin.base.fieldEditor.fundamentalField
data.value: This field is fundamental so it cannot be deleted

data.name: admin.base.fieldEditor.sidePanel.noAvailableSchemaText
data.value: You can create new schemas on List of reusable field schemas tab.

data.name: admin.base.fieldEditor.sidePanel.noAvailableSchemaTitle
data.value: There are no more reusable field schemas that can be selected.

data.name: admin.base.formComponent.additionalActions.optionsDepleted
data.value: All available options are already added.

data.name: admin.base.formComponent.assetSelector.selectAssets
data.value: Select or Drag&Drop files from a

data.name: admin.base.formComponent.codeName.explanationText
data.value:
• Only alphanumeric characters and some special characters ('_', '-', '.') are allowed
  • Cannot start or end with '.'

data.name: admin.base.formComponent.codeName.tooltip
data.value: An identifier used by developers. Must be unique across all objects of the same type.

data.name: admin.base.formComponent.contentItemAssetUploader.adjustImageDialog.calloutText
data.value: Use the purple dot to select a focal point. Unless cropped manually, image variants are automatically cropped based on the focal point.

data.name: admin.base.formComponent.contentItemAssetUploader.adjustImageDialog.cropExplanationIfNoOptions
data.value: No image crops are currently configured. Ask your project administrators to set them up.

data.name: admin.base.formComponent.contentItemAssetUploader.adjustImageDialog.cropTooltip
data.value: An image crop applies a predefined aspect ratio and fixed dimensions to the image. The system automatically upscales or downscales the image as needed to meet the specified dimensions.

data.name: admin.base.formComponent.contentItemAssetUploader.adjustImageDialog.qualityExplanation
data.value: Higher quality retains image details; lower quality reduces file size.

data.name: admin.base.formComponent.contentItemAssetUploader.unsupportedAdjustTooltip
data.value: The image cannot be adjusted due to an unsupported file extension. If you think this is a mistake, contact your system administrator.

data.name: admin.base.formComponent.namespaceCodeName.explanationText
data.value:
• Only alphanumeric characters and underscores allowed
  • Must begin with a letter or an underscore

data.name: admin.base.formComponent.validationRules.deleteConfirmation
data.value: Are you sure you want to remove the validation rule?

data.name: admin.base.listing.filters.noResultText
data.value: Try modifying your filters or start over

data.name: admin.base.listing.noDataTitle
data.value: There are no records to display

data.name: admin.base.listing.noItemsText
data.value: Create new content or move existing items here.

data.name: admin.base.listing.search.noResultText
data.value: Try changing your search phrase or start over

data.name: admin.base.listing.searchAndFilter.clearButtonLabel
data.value: Clear your search phrase and filters here

data.name: admin.base.listing.searchAndFilter.noResultText
data.value: Try changing your search phrase, modify your filters, or start over

data.name: admin.base.multiTagSelectorPanel.search.noResult.text
data.value: Try changing your search phrase or start over

data.name: admin.base.notificationEmails.preview.templateNotConfigured
data.value: Preview of the notification email cannot be displayed because a notification email template was not selected.

data.name: admin.base.permissions.appSelectApplicationDisabled
data.value: Permission set for this application is already defined

data.name: admin.base.permissions.appSelectWorkspaceDisabled
data.value: Permission set for this application and workspace is already defined

data.name: admin.base.permissions.noDataTitle
data.value: There are no records to display

data.name: admin.base.plugins.insertLink.options.asset.noExistingLibrary
data.value: Cannot insert link to a file from a media library. No available library to select the files from.

data.name: admin.base.plugins.insertLink.options.asset.tooltip
data.value: Insert link to a file from a media library.

data.name: admin.base.plugins.insertLink.options.external.tooltip
data.value: Insert link to an external website or resource.

data.name: admin.base.promptDialog.message
data.value: Are you sure you want to continue and discard the unsaved changes?

data.name: admin.base.schemaBarItem.noFields
data.value: The reusable field schema has no fields configured.

data.name: admin.base.settings.noSettingsText
data.value: This category does not contain any settings or you are not allowed to view these settings. Try selecting a sub-category if available.

data.name: admin.base.settings.noSettingsTitle
data.value: There are no settings to display

data.name: admin.base.smartFolderSelector.disabledFolderTooltip
data.value: This smart folder does not have dynamic content delivery enabled. You can enable it in the Content hub application (use the edit icon).

data.name: admin.base.standardMediaDimensions.cropHeightValidation
data.value: Please fill the height of the variant.

data.name: admin.base.standardMediaDimensions.cropNameValidation
data.value: Please fill the name of the variant.

data.name: admin.base.standardMediaDimensions.cropWidthValidation
data.value: Please fill the width of the variant.

data.name: admin.base.standardMediaDimensions.noDataTitle
data.value: There are no records to display

data.name: admin.base.tagDeleteDialog.callout.content
data.value: When deleted, published content may be affected and possibly broken.

data.name: admin.base.tagDeleteDialog.callout.headline
data.value: This tag or some of the children may be used in published content

data.name: admin.base.tagDeleteDialog.headline
data.value: Do you want to delete the following items?

data.name: admin.base.tagSelector.fallbackWarningMessage
data.value: Some of the selected tags are not translated. Their default language variant will be used instead.

data.name: admin.base.tagSelector.noTags
data.value: There are no tags available in this taxonomy.

data.name: admin.base.tagSelectorPanel.taxonomyNotConfigured.contactAdminText
data.value: Contact your system administrator to configure the field to use a different taxonomy.

data.name: admin.base.tagSelectorPanel.taxonomyNotConfigured.notAvailableText
data.value: The taxonomy for this field is not configured correctly.

data.name: admin.base.taxonomyStatus.tagTooltip
data.value: This tag is not translated. Default language variant will be used.

data.name: admin.base.taxonomyStatus.taxonomyTooltip
data.value: This taxonomy is not translated. Default language variant will be used.

data.name: admin.base.template.errorText
data.value: We have encountered an unexpected error.

data.name: admin.base.template.forbiddenAccessText
data.value: You don't have permission to perform this action. If you think this is an error, contact your administrator.

data.name: admin.base.tileSelector.search.noSearchResultText
data.value: Try changing your search phrase or start over

data.name: admin.base.unsavedChangesWrapper.closePrompts.closeOne.message
data.value: Are you sure you want to close the current dialog and discard the unsaved changes?

data.name: admin.base.visualBuilder.changeTemplate.confirmChange
data.value: By changing the template, all the content (widgets and sections with their data and properties) will be lost

data.name: admin.base.visualBuilder.changeTemplate.dialogHeadline
data.value: Do you really want to apply changes?

data.name: admin.base.visualBuilder.changeTemplate.keepConfigurationLabel
data.value: Keep current widgets and sections if possible

data.name: admin.base.workflows.step.deleteConfirmation
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected step?

data.name: admin.base.workflows.step.missingPermissions
data.value: You don't have the required permissions

data.name: admin.commerce.orderStatuses.cancelEditDialog.message
data.value: Are you sure you want to continue and discard the unsaved changes?

data.name: admin.commerce.orderStatuses.deleteConfirmation
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected item?

data.name: admin.content.contentItems.editContentItem.hint
data.value: Select content type for the new item

data.name: admin.content.contentItems.editContentItem.noContentTypesMessage
data.value: Cannot create a new content item because there are no available content types. Contact your administrators about the configuration of your project.

data.name: admin.content.contentItems.usages.tooltip
data.value: Displays items that use the current content item. The structure shows direct usages and continues to items indirectly referencing this item.

data.name: admin.content.pageBuilder.changeTemplate.calloutWarning
data.value: You can now select a new template for your page. Note that changing the template may result in loss of your widget data. Read more about page templates in our documentation

data.name: admin.content.pageBuilder.changeTemplate.keepConfigurationTooltip
data.value: Widgets and sections from the current template will be transferred if the new template contains editable areas with matching identifiers. Otherwise, Page Builder content from the current page will be discarded. If you're unsure about the expected behavior on your site, consult your administrators.

data.name: admin.content.pageBuilder.propertiesDialog.discardChanges
data.value:
Are you sure you want to close the dialog?
You have unsaved changes.
Select OK to continue or Cancel to continue editing.

data.name: admin.content.pageBuilder.restrictedWidgets.saveWarning
data.value: The page update includes a section type change, and some widgets could not be inserted due to the new section's widget zone restrictions. The widgets are available in the widget insert dialog and you can add them again to valid zones. After saving the page, these widgets will be lost permanently.

data.name: admin.content.pageBuilder.saveAsTemplate.unsavedChanges
data.value: You have unsaved changes on this page. Save your changes to create a new preset template.

data.name: admin.content.pages.createNewPage.hint
data.value: Select content type for the new item

data.name: admin.content.pages.createNewPage.noPageTypesMessage
data.value: Cannot create a new page, because there are no available content types for pages. Your administrators need to create a new content type with the 'Page' feature enabled.

data.name: admin.content.pages.noContentTypeAvailable
data.value: Cannot create a new page in this section. Your administrators need to create a new content type for this website channel or configure ‘Allowed content types' in the content type settings or ‘Scopes for content types' in the Channel management.

data.name: admin.content.pages.noFieldsTitle
data.value: This page has no editable fields.

data.name: admin.content.pages.noPageBuilderText
data.value: If this page is expected to have Page Builder enabled, contact your project's developers.

data.name: admin.content.pages.noPageBuilderTitle
data.value: Page Builder is not available for this page.

data.name: admin.content.pages.noPreviewText
data.value: This page does not have a visual representation to preview.

data.name: admin.content.pages.noPreviewTitle
data.value: Preview is not available for this page.

data.name: admin.content.pages.templateSelector.defaultDividerTooltip
data.value: Default page templates - determines a page's layout. Templates of this type first need to be created by the project's developers. They cannot be modified in the 'Preset templates' application.

data.name: admin.content.pages.templateSelector.noSearchResultText
data.value: Try changing your search phrase or start over

data.name: admin.content.pages.templateSelector.noTemplatesText
data.value: There are no templates available for the selected content type.

data.name: admin.content.pages.templateSelector.presetDividerTooltip
data.value: You can configure a page based on a template and save it as a preset page template. Preset page templates can be modified in the 'Preset templates' application and reused later.

data.name: admin.content.plugins.insertLink.options.asset.noExistingLibrary
data.value: Cannot insert link to a file from a media library. No available library to select the files from.

data.name: admin.content.plugins.insertLink.options.asset.tooltip
data.value: Insert link to a file from a media library.

data.name: admin.content.plugins.insertLink.options.external.tooltip
data.value: Insert link to an external website or resource.

data.name: admin.content.plugins.insertLink.options.page.tooltip
data.value: Insert link to a page from the content tree.

data.name: admin.content.taxonomy.move.tagMovedUnderItselfError
data.value: You cannot move a tag under itself.

data.name: admin.content.urlSelector.buttonTooltip
data.value: Select a page from the content tree

data.name: admin.content.urlSelector.inputTooltip
data.value: Relative URLs will be resolved on the live site.

data.name: admin.contentHub.cloneSmartFolderDialog.header
data.value: Do you want to clone the selected smart folder?

data.name: admin.contentHub.contentItemListing.searchNotification
data.value: Results for folder '{{folderName}}' and its subfolders

data.name: admin.contentHub.contentItemListing.smartFolderFilterInvalidNotification
data.value: The smart folder's filter criteria may be invalid.

data.name: admin.contentHub.contentItemListing.smartFolderFilterInvalidNotificationButton
data.value: Check, adjust and reapply your filter

data.name: admin.contentHub.contentItemListing.smartFolderIsEnabledForContentDeliveryNotification
data.value: This smart folder may be used for dynamic content delivery. Any changes may affect how the content is displayed in your channels.

data.name: admin.contentHub.createLanguageVariant.translationInProgress.title
data.value: AIRA is translating this item for you. It’ll be ready soon.

data.name: admin.contentHub.folderTree.deleteFolderDialog.callout.headline
data.value: Only the folder and subfolders will be deleted

data.name: admin.contentHub.folderTree.deleteFolderDialog.callout.text
data.value: When the folder and its subfolders are deleted, all content items stored within will remain and you can find them directly under 'All content items'.

data.name: admin.contentHub.folderTree.deleteFolderDialog.headline
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected folders?

data.name: admin.contentHub.massAssetUpload.extensionError
data.value:
The following files cannot be uploaded because they use forbidden file extensions: {{invalidExtensions}}

Allowed extensions are: {{allowedExtensions}}

data.name: admin.contentHub.massAssetUpload.sizeError
data.value:
The following files cannot be uploaded because they exceed the maximum file size: {{fileNames}}

Maximum file size: {{maxFileSize}}

data.name: admin.contentHub.massAssetUpload.uploadLabel
data.value: Mass asset upload is currently in progress. Please wait until the current upload finishes before uploading new assets.

data.name: admin.contentHub.massAssetUpload.uploadProgressPanel.closePrompt.message
data.value: Are you sure you want to continue and stop the upload? Files that have already been uploaded will stay in the system and won't be affected.

data.name: admin.contentHub.massAssetUpload.uploadProgressPanel.notificationBar.message
data.value: All files have been uploaded successfully.

data.name: admin.contentHub.massAssetUpload.uploadsCancelled
data.value: Uploads were cancelled because you left the Content Hub. Please stay in the Content Hub page while mass upload is in progress.

data.name: admin.contentHub.missingPermissions
data.value: You don't have the required permissions.

data.name: admin.contentHub.saveSmartFolderDialog.invalidFilterWarningLine2
data.value: Check your filter again and make sure it is set up correctly.

data.name: admin.contentHub.smartFolders.deleteDialog.callout.headline
data.value: Only the smart folder will be deleted

data.name: admin.contentHub.smartFolders.deleteDialog.callout.text
data.value: When the smart folder is deleted, content items displayed within will not be affected and you can find them directly under 'All content items'.

data.name: admin.contentHub.smartFolders.deleteDialog.calloutEnabledContentDelivery.headline
data.value: This smart folder may be used for dynamic content delivery. Any changes may affect how the content is displayed in your channels.

data.name: admin.contentHub.smartFolders.deleteDialog.calloutEnabledContentDelivery.text
data.value: When the smart folder is deleted, content items displayed within will not be affected and you can find them under 'All content items'.

data.name: admin.contentHub.smartFolders.deleteDialog.calloutEnabledContentDelivery.textHeadline
data.value: Only the smart folder will be deleted.

data.name: admin.contentHub.smartFolders.deleteDialog.headline
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected smart folder?

data.name: admin.contentHub.smartFolders.enableContentDeliveryDialog.headline
data.value: Do you want to enable dynamic content delivery for the selected smart folder?

data.name: admin.contentHub.smartFolders.enableContentDeliveryDialog.textFirstParagraph
data.value: This allows developers to retrieve items from the smart folder using various content delivery APIs for channels, and also makes the folder available in Smart folder selectors.

data.name: admin.contentHub.smartFolders.enableContentDeliveryDialog.textSecondParagraph
data.value: The Workflow status, Requires authentication, and Last modified filter criteria are not supported for smart folders with dynamic content delivery.

data.name: admin.contentHub.smartFolders.enableContentDeliveryDialog.textThirdParagraph
data.value: You cannot disable dynamic content delivery for a smart folder after you choose to enable it.

data.name: admin.digitalmarketing.automation.addWaitStepDialog.content
data.value: A wait step gives contacts time to perform the evaluated actions. For example, if your process sends an email and then immediately follows with a condition that checks if a link in the email was clicked, contacts will not have any time to receive and read the email.

data.name: admin.digitalmarketing.automation.addWaitStepDialog.headline
data.value: Add a Wait step before the condition?

data.name: admin.digitalmarketing.automation.contextMenu.delete.conditionStep.disabledTooltip
data.value: You cannot delete condition steps when both the true and false paths are connected to follow-up steps. One of the paths must be empty. The remaining path is then connected to the preceding step after the condition is deleted.

data.name: admin.digitalmarketing.automation.contextMenu.delete.disabledTooltip
data.value: You cannot delete steps, because this process is enabled or has been enabled and triggered in the past. There may be contacts passing through the steps.

data.name: admin.digitalmarketing.automation.enableDisableButton.confirmationDialog.heading
data.value: Save the process and change its status?

data.name: admin.digitalmarketing.automation.enableDisableButton.confirmationDialog.paragraph1
data.value: There are currently unsaved changes in the Automation Builder. Enabling the process automatically saves these changes.

data.name: admin.digitalmarketing.automation.enableDisableButton.confirmationDialog.paragraph2
data.value: Note that making significant changes to a process that was enabled in the past can lead to inconsistencies in the statistics displayed for steps. We recommend creating a new process if you need to make major changes.

data.name: admin.digitalmarketing.automation.enableDisableButton.disableTooltip
data.value: Prevents contacts from starting the process. Any existing contacts within the process continue as if the process were enabled.

data.name: admin.digitalmarketing.automation.enableDisableButton.enableTooltip
data.value: Allows the process to start for contacts who meet the trigger condition.

data.name: admin.digitalmarketing.automation.enableDisableButton.permissionRequired
data.value: You don't have the required permissions.

data.name: admin.digitalmarketing.customerJourneys.builder.atLeastOneStage
data.value: At least one stage is required.

data.name: admin.digitalmarketing.customerJourneys.builder.cardSubheadlineTooltip
data.value: Stages represent key steps in the customer journey, such as visiting a specific page or submitting a form. They help you track user progression and identify individuals at each stage, which enables you to take targeted actions, like re-engaging users or analyzing conversions to paying customers.

data.name: admin.digitalmarketing.customerJourneys.builder.permissionRequired
data.value: You don't have the required permissions.

data.name: admin.digitalmarketing.customerJourneys.columnGraph.columnTooltip
admin.digitalmarketing.customerJourneys.columnGraph.dropOffTooltip
data.value: Show the {{contacts}} contacts that dropped off after stage {{stage}}.

data.name: admin.digitalmarketing.customerJourneys.detail.recalculate.permissionRequired
data.value: You don't have the required permissions.

data.name: admin.digitalmarketing.customerJourneys.detail.showConditionsDialog.subHeadlineTooltip
data.value: Conditions that contacts must meet to advance to this stage.

data.name: admin.digitalmarketing.customerJourneys.detail.table.actions.disabledShowConditions
data.value: There aren't any conditions that contacts must meet to advance to this stage.

data.name: admin.digitalmarketing.customerJourneys.detail.table.actions.enabledShowConditions
data.value: Show conditions that contacts must meet to advance to this stage.

data.name: admin.digitalmarketing.customerJourneys.detail.table.tooltips.noConverted
data.value: No contacts met the conditions to advance to this stage.

data.name: admin.digitalmarketing.customerJourneys.detail.table.tooltips.noDropOff
data.value: No contacts dropped off after this stage.

data.name: admin.digitalmarketing.emailBuilder.changeTemplate.calloutWarning
data.value: You can now select a new template for your email. Note that changing the template may result in loss of your widget data. Read more about email preset templates in our documentation

data.name: admin.digitalmarketing.emailBuilder.changeTemplate.keepConfigurationTooltip
data.value: Widgets and sections from the current template will be transferred if the new template contains editable areas with matching identifiers. Otherwise, Email Builder content from the current email will be discarded. If you're unsure about the expected behavior on your channel, consult your administrators.

data.name: admin.digitalmarketing.emailBuilder.noEmailBuilderText
data.value: If this email is expected to have Email Builder enabled, contact your project's developers.

data.name: admin.digitalmarketing.emailBuilder.noEmailBuilderTitle
data.value: Email Builder is not available for this email.

data.name: admin.digitalmarketing.emailBuilder.restrictedWidgets.saveWarning
data.value: The page update includes a section type change, and some widgets could not be inserted due to the new section's widget zone restrictions. The widgets are available in the widget insert dialog and you can add them again to valid zones. After saving the page, these widgets will be lost permanently.

data.name: admin.digitalmarketing.emailBuilder.saveAsPresetTemplate.unsavedChanges
data.value: You have unsaved changes in this email. Save your changes to create a new preset template.

data.name: admin.digitalmarketing.emailPanel.noEmailChannel
data.value: There is no email channel available.

data.name: admin.digitalmarketing.emailPanel.noEmails
data.value: There are no emails of the selected types available.

data.name: admin.digitalmarketing.emails.content.noFieldsTitle
data.value: The content type selected for this email has no editable fields.

data.name: admin.digitalmarketing.emails.preview.copyButtonAriaLabel
data.value: Copy email HTML source code to clipboard

data.name: admin.digitalmarketing.emails.preview.copySuccessMessage
data.value: Email HTML source code has been successfully copied to clipboard.

data.name: admin.digitalmarketing.emails.preview.templateNotConfigured
data.value: Preview of the email cannot be displayed because an email template was not selected.

data.name: admin.digitalmarketing.forms.usage.tooltip
data.value: Displays pages that use this form in their Page Builder content via the Form widget. Does not include pages that render the form directly in their code. Expand the listed pages to view content items or pages that reference the given page and use the form indirectly.

data.name: admin.digitalmarketing.templateSelector.defaultDividerTooltip
data.value: Default email templates - determines an email's layout. Templates of this type first need to be created by the project's developers. They cannot be modified in the 'Preset templates' application.

data.name: admin.digitalmarketing.templateSelector.macroBasedDividerTooltip
data.value: Templates that use macros for dynamic content. Templates of this type can be modified in the 'Email templates' application.

data.name: admin.digitalmarketing.templateSelector.noSearchResultText
data.value: Try changing your search phrase or start over

data.name: admin.digitalmarketing.templateSelector.noTemplatesText
data.value: There are no templates available for the selected email purpose and content type.

data.name: admin.digitalmarketing.templateSelector.presetDividerTooltip
data.value: You can configure an email based on a template and save it as a preset email template. Preset email templates can be modified in the 'Preset templates' application and reused later.

data.name: admin.headless.headlessItems.content.noFieldsTitle
data.value: The content type selected for this headless item has no editable fields.

data.name: admin.headless.headlessItemSelector.contentItemPanel.disabledImage
data.value: This item cannot be selected because it doesn't have a suitable fallback variant, therefore no image would be shown in the rich text editor.

data.name: admin.headless.headlessItemSelector.contentItemPanel.noContentItems
data.value: There are no headless items of the selected types available.

data.name: admin.headless.headlessItemSelector.possibleFallbackMessage
data.value: Some of the selected items are not translated or do not have a published version. A fallback language variant will be used if available.

data.name: admin.websites.contentTree.dialogs.deletePageConfirmation.explanationTextInUse
data.value: This also removes all references to the items from other content in the system - pages, emails, other content items, etc.

data.name: admin.websites.contentTree.dialogs.deletePageConfirmation.explanationTextMultiple
data.value: Do you want to permanently delete selected pages?

data.name: admin.websites.contentTree.move.confirmMoveHeader
data.value: Are you sure you want to move '{{nodeName}}' and all its child pages?

data.name: admin.websites.contentTree.move.confirmResolveConflictsHeader
data.value: item(s) with conflicting URLs found in the target destination

data.name: admin.websites.contentTree.move.confirmResolveConflictsText
data.value: Items must have unique URLs. We can resolve it by adding a suffix to system URLs of conflicting items. Would you like to add suffix?

data.name: admin.websites.contentTree.move.pageMovedUnderItselfError
data.value: You cannot move a page under itself.

data.name: admin.websites.contentTree.search.moreResultsWarningMessage
data.value:
More results have been found.
Consider refining your search phrase.

data.name: admin.websites.contentTree.search.newPageButtonDisabledTooltip
data.value: You can't create a new page because the selected page isn't in the current page tree. Clear the search phrase or select a page to enable it.

data.name: admin.websites.contentTree.search.noResult.text
data.value: Try changing your search phrase or start over

data.name: admin.websites.plugins.insertLink.options.page.noExistingLibrary
data.value: Cannot insert a link to a page. No available page to select.

data.name: admin.websites.plugins.insertLink.options.page.tooltip
data.value: Insert a link to a selected page.

data.name: admin.websites.properties.permissions.brokenInheritanceInfo
data.value: This page has permissions that are different from those of its parent due to broken inheritance.

data.name: admin.websites.properties.permissions.discardChanges
data.value: Are you sure you want to continue and discard the changes made to permissions?

data.name: admin.websites.properties.permissions.inheritance.break.headline
data.value: Do you want to break the inheritance?

data.name: admin.websites.properties.permissions.inheritance.break.text
data.value: This action breaks permission inheritance and allows the definition of new permissions for the page and its children.

data.name: admin.websites.properties.permissions.inheritance.restore.headline
data.value: Do you want to restore the inheritance?

data.name: admin.websites.properties.permissions.inheritance.restore.text
data.value: This action makes the page and its children inherit the permissions of the page's parent.

data.name: admin.websites.properties.permissions.inheritance.restore.warning
data.value: Any existing broken inheritance rules on child pages will remain unchanged.

data.name: admin.websites.properties.permissions.quickTipBody
data.value: The permissions are propagated to all child pages until a child page breaks the inheritance.

data.name: admin.websites.webpages.noFieldsTitle
data.value: This page has no editable fields.

data.name: admin.websites.webpages.urlTab.currentUrls.canonicalTooltip
data.value: When selected, all URLs representing this page will redirect to this URL via a 301 redirect. This URL then represents the canonical URL for this page (i.e., the URL that is indexed by search engines).

data.name: admin.websites.webpages.urlTab.currentUrls.deleteConfirmationDialog.content
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete vanity URL?

data.name: admin.websites.webpages.urlTab.currentUrls.urlTooltip
data.value: Visitors can currently access the page using the active URLs. Inactive URLs reflect unpublished changes and will become active once the page is published.

data.name: admin.websites.webpages.urlTab.redirect.edit.forbiddenTooltip
data.value: You don't have the required permissions.

data.name: admin.websites.webpages.usageTab.tooltip
data.value: Displays items that use the current page. The structure shows direct usages and continues to items indirectly referencing this page.

data.name: admin.websites.webpages.webPageVersions.versionDetail.noData
data.value: This page has no editable fields and no page builder content.

data.name: admin.websites.webPageSelector.possibleFallbackMessage.multiple
data.value: Some of the selected web pages are not translated or do not have a published version. A fallback language variant will be used if available.

data.name: admin.websites.webPageSelector.possibleFallbackMessage.single
data.value: The selected web page is not translated or does not have a published version. The fallback language variant will be used if available.

data.name: kxp.public.admin.app.accountUnlock.accountUnlockedText
data.value: Your account has been unlocked. You can now sign in.

data.name: kxp.public.admin.app.accountUnlock.linkExpired
data.value: The account unlock link has expired

data.name: kxp.public.admin.app.logon.externalLogonError
data.value: You don't have permission to access the Xperience administration. If you think this is an error, contact your administrator.

data.name: kxp.public.admin.app.mfa.callout.text
data.value: On your phone, download and install an authenticator app (e.g., Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, LastPass Authenticator, etc.). In the app, scan the QR code or input the secret key manually.

data.name: kxp.public.admin.app.passwordReset.invalidTokenHeader
data.value: The password reset link has expired

data.name: kxp.public.admin.app.passwordResetLink.resetRequestedExternal
data.value: If you are using an external authentication provider, you need to reset your password on the website of your authentication provider.

data.name: kxp.public.admin.app.passwordResetLink.resetRequestedPt1
data.value: If an account with the provided email address

data.name: kxp.public.admin.app.passwordResetLink.resetRequestedPt2
data.value: exists, you will receive an email containing a link to reset your password.

data.name: kxp.public.admin.app.recoveryCode.calloutSubHeadline
data.value: Store this code in a safe location

data.name: kxp.public.admin.app.recoveryCode.calloutText
data.value: Use this recovery code to sign in if you lose access to the authentication application. The code can only be used once.

data.name: kxp.public.admin.app.ssoLoginMessage
data.value: Use your company account to sign in

data.name: kxp.public.admin.app.validationError
data.value: There were some issues submitting your form. See the individual inputs for details.

data.name: kxp.public.admin.base.notFound.text
data.value: The page you were looking for could not be found (404 Error).

data.name: kxp.public.admin.base.textArea.copyError
data.value: There was an error while copying

data.name: kxp.public.errors.general
data.value: We have encountered an unexpected error. Error status code: {{statusCode}} - {{statusMessage}}

data.name: kxp.public.errors.status.403
data.value: You are not authorized to perform this action.

data.name: kxp.public.errors.status.413
data.value: Request data is larger than limits defined by the server.
